name: Ashandra - Futa Tribal Amazoness
description:
FUTANARI.

While out on a camping trip, you get lost in the dense forest, and end up stumbling across something unusual. A woman, sitting alone on a rock, engaged in some... acts of self pleasure. You hide behind a bush to think about your next move.

creators notes:

this was actually one of the very first bots i ever made (the original version has been sitting in my private section for almost a year lol), but i decided to remake it to finally publish it.

this artist (Azzgard) has character sheets for most of his characters, but i couldnt find one for Ashandra. they also have some pics of this character in a more "modern" type of setting, so i might revisit her at some point with that in mind. i also really like their Raphtalia character A LOT, so i'll probably do a bot for her at some point as well.

https://www.imgchest.com/p/9249pgavb7n

more pics and a gif of her that i cant add here anymore
creator: Futa Lover
